title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Jindal Steel & Power - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Jindal Steel & Power - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Process Engineer with drive and ambition, Jindal Steel & Power in Hyderabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Jindal Steel & Power:
Jindal Steel & Power is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Six Sigma

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jindal Steel & Power!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
